description: 6-fold symmetric ring: 6 CQUAD4 sectors, oblique MPC tangential BCs, radial outward load 100 N/node

checks.comment: Outer node 7 (theta=0): radial T1 displacement on the coarse full-ring mesh.
Outer node 10 (theta=180): radial T1 negative by symmetry
Inner node 1 (theta=0): radial T1 on the coarse full-ring mesh.
Element 1 stress: von Mises on the coarse full-ring mesh.
Element 2 stress (theta=60-120 sector): von Mises on the coarse full-ring mesh.
